description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Player movement is typically restricted to a specific area of the playfield, such as the bottom fifth of the screen.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Enemies often enter from the top of the screen and move in predictable patterns, which players must learn to anticipate.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Shooting mechanics should provide immediate visual and auditory feedback to enhance player engagement.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should include bonus elements, such as a spider that grants extra points when shot, to encourage risk-taking.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A clear and visible score system is essential to motivate players to improve and beat their previous high scores.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
